scripts.dev: concurrently -n test,widget,proxy -c blue,green,yellow "cd test-app && bun run dev" "cd widget && bun run dev" "cd server && GEKTO_DEV=1 bun run dev"
scripts.dev:proxy: cd server && GEKTO_DEV=1 bun run dev
scripts.preview: bun run build && concurrently -n test,proxy -c blue,yellow "cd test-app && bun run dev" "cd server && bun run preview"
scripts.build: cd widget && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.bundle: bun run build && bun run scripts/bundle.ts
